---
description: A Webpack Loader that pre-compiles Bit flavored MDX
labels: ['TypeScript', 'Webpack-loader', 'mdx']
---

Bit-MDX Webpack Loader enables a pre-compilation of Bit flavoured MDX. The main job is to adapt `remark-admonitions` to `remark-directive` syntax. It should be run before mdx loader.

For example:

```js
{
    test: /\.mdx?$/,
    use: [
        // other loaders like babel-loader, mdx-loader, etc.
        ...
        {
            loader: require.resolve('@teambit/mdx.modules.mdx-pre-loader'),
        },
    ],
}
```

e.g.

```mdx
:::tip pro tip
`remark-admonitions` is pretty great!
:::
```

will be transformed to:

```mdx
:::tip[pro tip]
`remark-admonitions` is pretty great!
:::
```

see more: https://github.com/orgs/remarkjs/discussions/1374#discussioncomment-10818614
